r , Derivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable , SequenceActor , java.io.Serializable, TimedActor , TypedActor public class Wire extends DETransformer A Wire is a stateful actor in DE. It should

rmer A Wire is a stateful actor in DE. It should have an equal number of input and output channels. If it receives input on any of its channels, it should produce the most recent received on each input channel to the corresponding output chann

h input channel to the corresponding output channel for all channels. We can think its behavior similar to a wire in VHDL, where the value is always the most recently received. Since: Ptolemy II 5.2 Version: $Id: Wire.java,v 1.6 2006/03/29 20:53:5
